docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY REYES, ROBERTO C. AS TO DEFENDANT CALDERON, MARCIA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-27-2005 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
CERT MAIL SENT TO MARCIA CALDERON RETURNED SIGNED

SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION JAN-27-2005, CONTINUED BY COURT TO JUL-28-2005 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 FOR PROGRESS REPORT. SETTLEMENT BETWEEN THE PARTIES FOR A TOTAL AMOUNT OF $5032. IF NO APPEARANCES, CASE CONT'D FOR 6 MONTH INTERVALS UNTIL PAID OFF, AT WHICH TIME THE CASE WILL BE
DISMISSED W/ PREJ. PAYMENTS ARE TO BE MADE AT THE RATE OF $100/MONTH BEGINNING ON 2/2/05 AND ON THE 20TH DAY OF EACH MONTH THEREAFTER UNTIL PAID IN
FULL. IF ANY PAYMENT IS MISSED, THE ENTIRE BALANCE BECOMES DUE IMMEDIATELY.

SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION JUL-28-2005, CONTINUED BY COURT TO JAN-04-2006 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 FOR PROGRESS REPORT. SETTLEMENT BETWEEN PARTIES FOR A TOTAL AMOUNT OF $5032. IF NO APPEARANCES, CASE CONTINUED FOR 6 MONTH INTERVALS UNTIL PAID OFF, AT WHICH TIME THE CASE WILL BE DISMISSED WITH
PREJUDICE. PAYMENTS ARE TO BE MADE AT THE RATE OF $100/MONTH BEGINNING ON 2/2/05 & ON THE 2ND DAY OF EACH MONTH THEREAFTER UNTIL PAID IN FULL. IF ANY
PAYMENT IS MISSED, THE ENTIRE BALANCE BECOMES DUE IMMEDIATELY.
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION JAN-04-2006, CONTINUED BY COURT TO JUN-28-2006 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 CONTINUE FOR PROGRESS REPORT.
DECLARATION FILED BY PLAINTIFF.
CIVIL SUBPEONA RETURNED SERVED.
PLAINTIFF FILED REQUEST FOR CONTINUANCE. ($10.00 FEE PAID). COMMISSIONER TO SIGN ORDER.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF REYES, ROBERTO C. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CALDERON, MARCIA $4,732.00 PRINCIPAL, $32.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,764.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
